data.title: 网页活动「Special Opera! Problem Solver 68’s Hard-boiled Day」
data.summary: Web Event Notice Sensei! The "Special Opera! Problem Solver 68's Hard-boiled Day" event has begun! V
data.body:
Web Event Notice

Sensei! The "Special Opera! Problem Solver 68's Hard-boiled Day" event has begun!
View the special episodes, and get Pyroxene gifts!

🗓️Event Period: 8/20 (Tue) After Maintenance – 9/2 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
